impact: Running --cleanup during a single-series import nukes every other series in the database. Easy to mis-use; has bitten before. Need scoping, confirmation, or rework before recommending to anyone.
resolution: Scoped --cleanup to only the imported series via Wagtail page tree (path__startswith on imported SeriesIndexPage records) for Page models and series__in for Location snippets. Cleanup now refuses to run when no imported series resolves to an existing SeriesIndexPage, eliminating the prior "no scope = wipe everything" failure mode. SeriesIndexPage itself is no longer pruned by --cleanup. Added 5 regression tests in narrative/tests/test_import_fabula.py::CleanupScopingTest covering the cross-series preservation guarantee and the unresolvable-scope abort path.
title: import_fabula --cleanup deletes ALL non-exported series
